macro.title: Markets Eye Strait of Hormuz Reopening and Warsh’s First Fed Meeting as Key Tests This Week
macro.what: This Week In A Nutshell: It’s going to be a big week with an announced deal that may open the Strait of Hormuz by Friday and Kevin Warsh’s first Fed meeting on Wednesday
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Record Home Prices, High Mortgage Rates Push Pending Sales Down for Fourth Straight Week
macro.what: High housing costs and economic instability are driving would-be buyers away
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: UWM announces doctor loan offering
housing.what: UWM launches doctor loans for medical professionals, offering low or no down payments, no mortgage insurance and flexible student debt rules.
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Congress reaches bipartisan agreement on ROAD to Housing Act
housing.what: Leaders in the House of Representatives and the Senate announced Tuesday that they have reached an agreement on the final version of the first comprehensive housing bill in a gener
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: Pending home sales rise in May across all U.S. regions
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: Mortgage applications slip 3.8% as purchase demand stays ahead of 2025
housing.what: MBA data show mortgage applications fell 3.8% weekly, with 30-year conforming at 6.60% and refi share at 40.3%.
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: These new 84-ft L.A. towers could alter the arc of housing reform
housing.what: If all goes well, a string of low-slung retail buildings along the Los Angeles River could become one of the largest apartment developments to rise from California’s housing reforms

housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: Florida Dominates May’s Most Expensive Home Sales, Led by a $75 Million Boca Raton Deal

housing.title: SpaceX Employees Could Buy 2 in 5 San Antonio Homes With Their IPO Windfall
housing.what: The massive IPO would create enough wealth for SpaceX employees to buy roughly 40% of all the homes in San Antonio, one of the closest major metros to where the company is headquartered

notables.title: New York senior homeowners included in $2.1B property tax relief measure
